member.name: T:Currying.Extensions
member.summary: Provides a set of functional-style extension helpers for piping values through functions, cloning by MemberwiseClone, and iterating collections with actions.

member.name: T:Currying.Extensions.<G>$8048A6C8BE30A622530249B904B537EB`1.<M>$9693FCD04DC098E818044F36B6B87842
member.summary: Provides object-level helpers for a generic instance of .
member.typeparam: The instance type the extensions apply to.

member.name: M:Currying.Extensions.<G>$8048A6C8BE30A622530249B904B537EB`1.Clone
member.summary: Creates a shallow copy of the current instance by invoking the protected MemberwiseClone method via reflection.
member.returns: A shallow copy of the current object as , or if the clone operation is not available.

member.name: T:Currying.Extensions.<G>$8048A6C8BE30A622530249B904B537EB`1.<M>$52F2F8F0E9337F24B89A66DE590D3F24
member.typeparam: Type of the caller value being piped.

member.name: M:Currying.Extensions.<G>$8048A6C8BE30A622530249B904B537EB`1.Pipe(System.Action{`0}[])
member.summary: Pipes the caller into one or more delegates. Each action is invoked with the caller as its argument.
member.param: Actions to invoke with the caller.

member.name: M:Currying.Extensions.<G>$8048A6C8BE30A622530249B904B537EB`1.Pipe``1(System.Action{`0,``0},``0)
member.summary: Pipes the caller into a two-argument action along with an extra argument.
member.typeparam: Type of the second argument accepted by .
member.param: The action to invoke with the caller and .

member.name: M:Currying.Extensions.<G>$8048A6C8BE30A622530249B904B537EB`1.Pipe``1(System.Func{`0,``0})
member.summary: Pipes the caller through a function and returns the function result.
member.param: The function to apply to the caller.
member.returns: The result of applying to the caller.

member.name: M:Currying.Extensions.<G>$8048A6C8BE30A622530249B904B537EB`1.Pipe(System.Boolean,System.Func{`0,`0}[])
member.summary: Pipes the caller through a sequence of transforming functions. When is , the first step clones the caller using and all functions operate on the cloned value.
member.param: If , a shallow clone of the caller is created before applying the functions; otherwise the caller may be mutated by the functions.
Sequence of functions that transform the value.
member.returns: The final transformed value after applying all .

member.name: M:Currying.Extensions.<G>$8048A6C8BE30A622530249B904B537EB`1.Pipe(System.Func{`0,`0}[])
member.summary: Pipes the caller through a sequence of transforming functions (non-immutable overload).
member.param: Sequence of functions that transform the value.
member.returns: The final transformed value after applying all .

member.name: T:Currying.Extensions.<G>$8048A6C8BE30A622530249B904B537EB`1.<M>$547F3ED9A1D1A8FC90B4F3B89689A128
member.summary: Pipes a value into a two-argument function, returning the function result.
member.param: The value to be passed as the first argument to .

member.name: M:Currying.Extensions.<G>$8048A6C8BE30A622530249B904B537EB`1.Pipe``2(System.Func{`0,``0,``1},``0)
member.summary: Applies a function that accepts the caller and an additional argument, returning the result.
member.returns: The result of invoked with and .

member.name: M:Currying.Extensions.<G>$E09FCB5EB13C1AE2FC524F6744DE5322`1.ForEach(System.Action{`0})
member.param: The action to execute for each element.

member.name: T:Currying.Extensions.<G>$B7F0343159FB3A22D67EC9801612841A`2.<M>$9582521347D3786323CD533C7B4F1FAF
member.summary: Enables a forward "pipe" operator syntax that applies a function to a value: value >> func.

member.name: M:Currying.Extensions.<G>$B7F0343159FB3A22D67EC9801612841A`2.op_RightShift(`0,System.Func{`0,`1})
member.summary: Applies to and returns the result. This allows using the operator form: value >> func.

member.name: T:Currying.Extensions.<G>$9A0204638C6A592B54686EAB5A687859`2.<M>$04436269E3A46C1D9C1EC050836EB9B7
member.summary: Provides pipe-back helpers and an operator overload for functions so you can call func >> value as a shorthand for func(value).

member.name: M:Currying.Extensions.<G>$9A0204638C6A592B54686EAB5A687859`2.PipeBack(`0)
member.summary: Applies the function to and returns the result.
member.param: Argument to pass to the function.
member.returns: The result of invoking the function with .

member.name: M:Currying.Extensions.<G>$9A0204638C6A592B54686EAB5A687859`2.op_RightShift(System.Func{`0,`1},`0)
member.summary: Operator overload to support function-first pipe syntax: func >> arg.
